local_names.pa: ਮੁੱਖ ਮੰਤਰੀ ਅਬੂਆ ਸਵਾਸਥ ਸੁਰੱਖਿਆ ਯੋਜਨਾ (ਝਾਰਖੰਡ)

income_thresholds.description: No direct income threshold. Eligibility based on NFSA ration card (pink, yellow, or green category). Covers approximately 33.44 lakh families in Jharkhand.
income_thresholds.source: Jharkhand State Government / BIS Jharkhand Portal

exclusion_rules.description: Only residents of Jharkhand are eligible
Must hold a valid NFSA ration card (pink, yellow, or green category) issued in Jharkhand
Families covered under CGHS or ESIC are excluded
Income tax paying families are excluded

family_criteria.family_definition: Family as defined in NFSA ration card. All members listed on the ration card are covered. Coverage is floater across all family members. No cap on family size.

covered_procedures: Cardiology (bypass surgery, angioplasty, valve replacement, pacemaker)
Orthopedic (knee replacement, hip replacement, spine surgery)
Diagnostics and lab tests during hospitalization

required_documents.name: NFSA Ration Card (Pink/Yellow/Green)
required_documents.notes: Must be valid NFSA ration card in pink (Antyodaya), yellow (priority), or green (PHH) category issued in Jharkhand. This is MANDATORY.

required_documents.name: Mobile Number
required_documents.notes: Linked to Aadhaar for OTP-based verification

enrollment_steps: Step 1: Check eligibility at bis.jharkhand.gov.in or call 104 / 18003456540 with Aadhaar or ration card number
Step 2: Visit nearest CSC (Pragya Kendra) or empanelled hospital with Aadhaar and NFSA ration card
Step 3: Complete e-KYC verification (Aadhaar biometric or OTP)
Step 4: Operator verifies NFSA ration card status (pink/yellow/green) in BIS portal
Step 5: Family photograph taken and uploaded
Step 7: Card valid immediately; present at any empanelled hospital in Jharkhand for cashless treatment up to Rs 15 lakh
description_for_embedding: Mukhyamantri Abua Swasthya Suraksha Yojana is Jharkhand's flagship state health insurance scheme providing a massive Rs 15 lakh (Rs 1,500,000) per family per year — three times the PM-JAY coverage. Targets NFSA ration card holders (pink, yellow, green categories) covering approximately 33.44 lakh families. Covers hospitalization, surgery, organ transplant, oncology, and more. One of the highest coverage amounts among all Indian state health schemes. Enrollment via BIS Jharkhand portal or CSC. Helplines: 104 and 18003456540.
